globalProperty.value: [ { "category": "Ethiopia EMR Roles", "roles": [ "ethiopiaemr: Finance Officer", "ethiopiaemr: MRU", "ethiopiaemr: Liaison Officer", "ethiopiaemr: Nurse", "ethiopiaemr: Physician", "ethiopiaemr: Triage Nurse", "ethiopiaemr: Laboratory Personnel", "ethiopiaemr: Adult Triage", "ethiopiaemr: Emergency Triage", "ethiopiaemr: Gynecological Triage", "ethiopiaemr: Pediatric Triage" ] } ]
